text: Hey sis. I sent Mama's mortgage piece this morning. Did Margaret say how the cardiology follow-up went?
Got it, thank you. Dr. Thompson adjusted her blood pressure med, nothing alarming. I'll call Mama tonight. Still hoping you'll come down before it gets hot.
I'm aiming for spring break. Tell Mama I'll bring the good coffee. How's Claire's debate season going?
Buenas, Karen. Su mamá está bien hoy. She ate well and we walked to the mailbox. I changed Thursday to 9am if that is okay.
Thank you, Margaret. 9am Thursday is fine. The pharmacy refill should be ready by then if you can pick it up. I appreciate you.
Cousins — who's driving up to the NC mountain house this summer? Trying to lock the dates before the cabin fills.
We're in for a week in July if the porch is still standing. Karen's already planning the cooking.
I'll bring the cast iron and the mango chutney. Somebody else handles the firewood this time.
Mom, I'm staying at the library late tonight, big systems exam Friday. Can you save me a plate?
Always. There's pork in the fridge. Drive safe coming back from Boca, and text me when you leave.
Morning Karen — still good to bring the kids by Sunday after Mass? I'll make the squash soup if you handle the bread.
Deal. Bread's on me. Come by anytime after one, John's doing a slow braise.
Rachel, can you take the two new intakes Thursday afternoon? I'm covering Marcus's ADHD follow-ups while he's out. PHQ-9 and GAD-7 already in the portal.
Yes, I've got them. I'll send you a note on the second one before the staff meeting. Thanks Karen.
Out tomorrow for my daughter's recital. I rescheduled my substance-use group to Friday and flagged the two refills for Rachel. All set?
All set, enjoy the recital. Rachel's covering the refills. See you Wednesday for the all-hands.
Anthony, I'll have the Q3 bank statements and receipts to you by the 31st. Quick question on the S-corp estimated payment for next quarter when you have a minute.
Sounds good. Send them over and I'll run the quarterly. Let's hop on a call Friday about the estimate.
Karen, the Fall Cultural Competence course is confirmed for you. Can we meet next week to finalize the syllabus and the practicum student list?
Wonderful, thank you Nadine. Tuesday afternoon works for me. I'll bring the CFI module draft and the readings list.
